case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. FERNANDO MARTINS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY FRED TAFRESHI--CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 85.50 - SERVED FEB-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,884.87 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO $5,085.50 PRINCIPAL, $4,884.87 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,970.37

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINS, FERNANDO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
